message:
feat: add SVD and QR decomposition, expand conformance test coverage

Implement core linear algebra decompositions and strengthen the
conformance test suite with adversarial edge cases:

- Add 2x2 SVD decomposition to fnp-linalg with proper singular value
  ordering and sign conventions (~894 lines of new linalg code)
- Add QR decomposition via Householder reflections with numerical
  stability guarantees
- New linalg differential test cases fixture for SVD/QR validation
  against NumPy reference outputs
- Expand ufunc adversarial cases: zero-extent broadcasting edge cases
  and non-finite division behavior (NaN/Inf propagation semantics)
- Add zero-extent axis reduction with keepdims conformance tests to
  verify shape preservation in degenerate dimensions
- Update test contracts with decomposition verification predicates

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
